name: JiimSmith Home desk and object-centric navigation
description: Verify that the JiimSmith frontend project opens on the current Home workspace with object navigation, model badge, KPIs, and current lead desk areas.

planSteps.description: Verify the app lands on the Home view without errors, a blank screen, or a stuck loading state.
Verify the navigation shows exactly these business object views: Home, Campaigns, Brand, Team.
Verify a live model badge is visible in the top bar, for example "live on mock (offline demo)" or a real provider/model name.
Verify Home shows KPI tiles such as Active campaigns, Scheduled posts, and Approved.
Verify Home shows Start something with the "New campaign from an idea" action.
Verify Home shows the Agent Inbox area with either proposed next moves or the empty state asking the user to click Plan next moves.
Click Campaigns, Brand, Team, then Home.
Verify each view renders content without a crash, blank screen, or stuck loading state.
